expected.title: OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events

text:
The unresolved Sentry issue with the highest event count is **SENTRY-3025** ("NullPointer: Checkout latency spikes at peak") with **4,940 events**.

**Email sent:**

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **To** | oncall@acme.io |
| **Subject** | Top error |
| **Body** | NullPointer: Checkout latency spikes at peak |

The write succeeded (message: "insert on \"emails\" fired").

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'sentry_issues'"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT id, title, count FROM sentry_issues WHERE status != 'resolved' ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"INSERT INTO emails (to_addr, subject, body) VALUES ('oncall@acme.io', 'Top error', 'NullPointer: Checkout latency spikes at peak')"}
